description_long: This cafe features a rectangular, single-story structure with a bold red exterior and a flat roof. The front facade includes a large wooden door, a wide window, and a set of sliding shoji-style panels, giving it a blend of modern and traditional Japanese influences. Outdoor seating is provided with several white tables and chairs arranged on a green artificial turf patio, accommodating multiple guests. The interior is partially visible, showing a counter area with menu boards and a staff member, as well as a secondary room separated by sliding panels. The rear of the building is more utilitarian, with a plain red wall, a service door, and a small sink or utility fixture. The overall design is clean and functional, with an emphasis on accessibility and open-air dining.
description: A modern cafe with a red exterior, shoji-style panels, and outdoor seating on green turf. Features a welcoming entrance, large windows, and a visible service counter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, shoji-style panels, large window, and outdoor seating area with tables and chairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended outdoor seating area and a large window, with a person visible near the tables.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain red wall, a service door, and a small exterior sink or utility fixture.
description_view_3: Back view showing the shoji-style sliding panels, interior counter area, and the arrangement of outdoor tables and chairs.
